EnumTRTEXC.description: Movement processing code / (blank) = Empty, 1 = Creation, 2 = Modification, 8 = Simulation, 9 = Cancellation
EnumTRTEXC.description_es: Código de procesamiento del movimiento / (en blanco) = Vacío, 1 = Creación, 2 = Modificación, 8 = Simulación, 9 = Cancelación

EnumTYPPHT.description: Photo type / STK = Stock, DOR = Dormant stock, EMP = Location
EnumTYPPHT.description_es: Tipo de foto / STK = Stock, DOR = Stock inactivo, EMP = Ubicación
EnumTYPPHT.description_en: Photo type / STK = Stock, DOR = Dormant stock, EMP = Location

EnumTOPIMM.description: Immobilization indicator / O = Immobilized, N = Not immobilized
EnumTOPIMM.description_es: Indicador de inmovilización / O = Inmovilizado, N = No inmovilizado
EnumTOPIMM.description_en: Immobilization indicator / O = Immobilized, N = Not immobilized

EnumTOPOCC.description: Location occupancy indicator / O = Occupied location, N = Free location
EnumTOPOCC.description_es: Indicador de ocupación de la ubicación / O = Ubicación ocupada, N = Ubicación libre
EnumTOPOCC.description_en: Location occupancy indicator / O = Occupied location, N = Free location

EnumETASER.description: Serial number status code / 10 = Received, 50 = Prepared, 60 = Shipped
EnumETASER.description_es: Código de estado del número de serie / 10 = Recibido, 50 = Preparado, 60 = Expedido
EnumETASER.description_en: Serial number status code / 10 = Received, 50 = Prepared, 60 = Shipped

EnumSENMVT.description: Physical movement direction / + = Storage / De-immobilization, - = Destocking / Immobilization
EnumSENMVT.description_es: Sentido del movimiento físico / + = Almacenamiento / desinmovilización, - = Desalmacenamiento / inmovilización
EnumSENMVT.description_en: Physical movement direction / + = Storage / De-immobilization, - = Destocking / Immobilization

EnumETAPAL.description: Stored pallets status code / 10 = Pallet already at picking, 20 = Pallet to bring down to picking, 30 = Complete pallet to destock, 40 = Stored pallet, 50 = Pallet being stored, 60 = Pallet being shipped, 70 = Pallet reserved for copacking, 90 = Heterogeneous pallet restocked
EnumETAPAL.description_es: Código de estado de los palés almacenados / 10 = Palé ya en picking, 20 = Palé a bajar a picking, 30 = Palé completo a desalmacenar, 40 = Palé almacenado, 50 = Palé en curso de almacenamiento, 60 = Palé en curso de expedición, 70 = Palé reservado para copacking, 90 = Palé heterogéneo reubicado
EnumETAPAL.description_en: Stored pallets status code / 10 = Pallet already at picking, 20 = Pallet to bring down to picking, 30 = Complete pallet to destock, 40 = Stored pallet, 50 = Pallet being stored, 60 = Pallet being shipped, 70 = Pallet reserved for copacking, 90 = Heterogeneous pallet restocked

EnumMESPRO.description: Product measurement method / 1 = Unit measurement, 2 = Variable measurement, 3 = Regulated measurement
EnumMESPRO.description_es: Método de medición del producto / 1 = Medición unitaria, 2 = Medición variable, 3 = Medición regulada
EnumMESPRO.description_en: Product measurement method / 1 = Unit measurement, 2 = Variable measurement, 3 = Regulated measurement
